title: Architectural Coordinator
description:
Job Description:

  • Coordinate architectural consultants, subcontractors, and suppliers
  • Schedule, coordinate and strategy architectural works refer to the project schedule and plan
  • Check and submit for approval Method Statement /SWP /DWG / Brochure &Sample and all submissions for multiple Architectural works
  • Review, check and coordinate workability /quality/compliance of specialist /sub-contractor design/shop drawings /site works
  • Monitor, check and ensure implementation of architectural works on site refer to approved drawings and documents
  • Ensure project operations are in compliance with ISO standard and safety requirements, documented procedures as well as client, companies,building codes and authorities’ requirements
  • Coordinate site works with C&S, M&E & authorities
  • Support QS and Site team not limited to site architectural works only
  • Review clashes and other information from BIM team related to architecture; and coordinate with relevant parties to solve any problem arise
  • Function as support for ICE session
  • Ad-hoc matters as assigned by the PM

Requirements:


Qualifications& Experience :

  • Recognised Degree in Architectural, Engineering or equivalent
  • Safety certificate,e.g. BCSS
  • Min 2-3 years relevant working experience, preferably in the Construction Industry with maincon

Technical Competencies:

  • Good knowledge of architectural design principles, building code of practice, and construction regulations
  • Strong technical skills in reading and interpreting architectural drawings, specifications, and other technical documents
  • Proficient in the use of CAD/BIM software and other architectural design tools
  • With a completed experience in TOP/CSC process
  • Good communication and interpersonal skills to liaise effectively with various stakeholders
  • Proven problem-solving abilities and the capacity to work collaboratively in a team environment

postedCompany.description: Kimly Construction Pte Ltd was first established in the 1970s. Over the past four decades, the Company has emerged as one the most respected and sought after general contracting firms in Singapore. We are committed to our clients, our team members and our industry. Commitment is a trait that all the best teams and their members must possess. We have proven our ability to take on large, complex projects and complete them on time, on budget, and at the highest levels of quality and have been a recipient of several awards for its past projects.
postedCompany.name: KIMLY CONSTRUCTION PRIVATE LIMITED
